results.content: {"results": [{"title": "Enterprise Print Management Software Market 2025", "content": "Global print management solutions market reached $150B in 2024, with software comprising 60% ($90B). Expected to grow to $170B by 2025, with software exceeding $100B. Key drivers: cloud adoption, AI in document management, cost reduction needs, and data security compliance. Major players include PaperCut, Printix, PrinterLogic, uniFLOW, YSoft SafeQ, HP JetAdvantage, and Equitrac.", "url": "https://www.softwaresuggest.com/print-management-software"}, {"title": "PaperCut - Industry Leader in Print Management", "content": "Australian-based market leader serving 100M+ users globally. Products include PaperCut MF (enterprise), PaperCut Hive (cloud-based), PaperCut NG (mid-market), and PaperCut Pocket (small business). Key features: print quotas, secure release (card/PIN), cost allocation, mobile printing, environmental reporting, cross-platform support (Windows/macOS/Linux/Chrome OS/iOS/Android). Free 5-u
